mapper.insert: insert into project_version(project_id, source_type, branch_name, source_path, index_status, created_at) values (#{projectId}, #{sourceType}, #{branchName}, #{sourcePath}, 'PENDING', now())
mapper.sql: id, project_id, source_type, branch_name, commit_id, source_path, index_status, index_message, coalesce(indexed_at, created_at) as updated_at
mapper.select: select from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} order by id desc
select from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and index_status = 'SUCCESS' order by id desc limit 1
select source_path from project_version where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.delete: delete from project_version where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId}
